/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-undefined,dynamic_lookup -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib -compatibility_version 2.0.0 -current_version 2.0.0 -o libsbert.2.0.dylib -install_name @rpath/libsbert.2.dylib CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/BertIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/HnswConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/ShardedIndex.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/BertIndexManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/Util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/OffsetFile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/FileLock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/SBertGGML.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/hf_mapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/StringEmbedding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/FileStreamCache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sbert_shared.dir/src/unified_hnsw.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-blas -Wl,-rpath,/Volumes/Celeritas/CoreQuarry/Schmate/build/bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-metal bert_build/libbert.3.12.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/libggml.0.12.0.dylib -framework Accelerate -framework Accelerate bert_build/ggml/src/libggml-cpu.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-blas/libggml-blas.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/ggml-metal/libggml-metal.0.12.0.dylib bert_build/ggml/src/libggml-base.0.12.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/libomp.dylib
